articles.title: Middle East airports closed and thousands of travelers stranded after attack on Iran
articles.description:
More than 3,400 flights were canceled Sunday across seven airports in the Mideast, according to flight tracker Flightradar24.

The post Middle East airports closed and thousands of travelers stranded after attack on Iran appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Middle East airports closed following an attack on Iran, affecting Boston travelers.
Over 3,400 flights canceled Sunday, stranding thousands of passengers.
Boston residents may face significant delays and disruptions in travel plans.

articles.title: 9 killed as protesters try to storm US Consulate in Pakistan over killing of Iran’s supreme leader
articles.description:
The violence came hours after the United States and Israel attacked Iran and killed the country’s supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

The post 9 killed as protesters try to storm US Consulate in Pakistan over killing of Iran’s supreme leader appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Nine protesters were killed attempting to storm the US Consulate in Pakistan.
The violence followed the US and Israel's attack on Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
Boston residents may face increased tensions and security concerns due to international unrest.

articles.title: Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who led the Islamic Republic since 1989, is dead at 86
articles.description:
Iranian state media reported the death early Sunday, after a major attack launched by Israel and the United States.

The post Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who led the Islamic Republic since 1989, is dead at 86 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei died at 86 on March 1, 2026.
Khamenei led Iran since 1989, influencing regional politics and security.
Boston residents may see shifts in Middle Eastern relations affecting local communities.

articles.title: The Latest: Israel hits Tehran as Iran’s counterattacks widen after supreme leader is killed
articles.description:
There were explosions in Tehran on Sunday as Israel said it was taking its attacks to the “heart” of Iran’s capital.

The post The Latest: Israel hits Tehran as Iran’s counterattacks widen after supreme leader is killed appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Israel launched attacks in Tehran on March 1, escalating regional tensions.
Iran's counterattacks are intensifying following the death of its supreme leader.
Boston residents may face increased geopolitical risks and potential impacts on oil prices.

articles.title: Knight delivers joke during ‘SNL’ appearance featuring US men and women hockey gold medal winners
articles.description:
The four players wore USA jerseys with their gold medals draped from their necks.

The post Knight delivers joke during ‘SNL’ appearance featuring US men and women hockey gold medal winners appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston's own Knight joked during 'SNL' with US hockey gold medal winners.
Four players showcased their gold medals, celebrating their achievements on national TV.
The appearance boosts local pride and highlights Boston's connection to Olympic sports.

articles.title: Review and setlist: Chris Stapleton brings the blues to Mohegan Sun Arena
articles.description:
Stapleton slipped effortlessly between blues and ballads and even leaned into three stripped-down moments that were just him and his guitar on stage.

The post Review and setlist: Chris Stapleton brings the blues to Mohegan Sun Arena appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Chris Stapleton performed at Mohegan Sun Arena on March 1, showcasing blues and ballads.
The concert featured three intimate performances with just Stapleton and his guitar.
Local fans experienced a unique blend of music, enhancing Boston's vibrant concert scene.
